creator: king@xs4all.nl
text:
Hi,

No problem. Just noticed the build error and thought it would be nice to =
left you know. I'm still running the older version.

Thanks for your effort!

King Ling
Op 18 jun. 2012, om 21:57 heeft Tor Halvard Furulund het volgende =
geschreven:

>> This port won't build anymore when PF integration is set. I think =
it's due to this:
>=20
> Hi, =20
>=20
> I'm sorry about that.
> New patch is submitted, you can follow the progress of that patch at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D169205
>=20
> Will hopefully be back in ports by a few days.
>=20
> --=20
> Tor Halvard Furulund
